title: Liquid Staking on Hyperliquid with Valantis - stHYPE & HyENA
summary_title: Stake Type's multi-account design unlocks institutional hype staking on Hyperliquid
summary_description: How Valantis built the only LST capturing hype's full utility: market-making discounts, HIP-3 deployments, and Athena partnership yield.

key_moments.label: AI-generated Valantis anthem surprise, 15 minutes to create
Zerk introduces himself as Wrecking co-founder, hosts with Ollie from Valantis
Ollie defines Valantis: liquid staking and liquidity products earning more hype than anywhere else
Why Hyperliquid: only chain with genuine market product-market fit for DeFi teams
Points launch was strategically delayed 8-9 months until products could scale billions in TVL
Stake Type solves hype utility gap: lets any staker access 400K market-making discounts, HIP-3 requirements
Athena partnership: USDE quote asset is non-slashable, guarantees 20K hype yearly to ST hype holders
Ollie predicts hype top-5 asset in 2026, eventually flipping Ethereum on 5-10 year timeframe

pull_quote: Hype trades more like a fundamental asset than pretty much any other token, yet it's hilariously undervalued relative to Cardano or Tron.
